title: Kappa's AntiCheat
description: A lightweight Fabric anti-cheat designed for high performance on large-scale servers.
body:
# 🛡️ Kappa's AntiCheat
Kappa's AntiCheat is a lightweight, modular anti-cheat mod for Fabric servers, built to perform at scale without sacrificing reliability.
It provides essential cheat detection with configurable thresholds, actions, and full server-side control.

## Features
Fly Check – Detects players hovering or staying airborne illegally

Speed Check – Flags abnormal movement speeds

Fully Configurable – Enable/disable checks, customize thresholds, and define commands to execute on violation

Config stored in config/kappasac/config.json

Server-only – Works with vanilla clients

## Default Actions
When a player triggers too many violations:

Warn them in chat at a configurable threshold

Execute any command (e.g., /kick %player%, /ban %player%, etc.)

## Config

```
{
  "checks": {
    "FlyCheck": {
      "enabled": true,
      "maxViolations": 10
    },
    "SpeedCheck": {
      "enabled": true,
      "maxViolations": 8
    }
  },
  "warningThreshold": 5,
  "commandOnMax": "kick %player% Detected cheating (%check%)"
}
```

## Future Plans
KillAura, NoFall, Reach, and AutoClicker checks

Logging to file and violation dashboards

Commands like /ac violations <player>

## Requirements
Minecraft 1.21.5+

Fabric Loader 0.16.4+

Java 21

## Need Help? Feature Requests?
Join our Discord or open an issue on GitHub
